hero.title: Get in touch with the right team, without the friction.
hero.description: Reach out for support, access requests, creator onboarding, or premium questions. We will help you get to the right place quickly.

routing.title: Start with the request that fits best.
routing.description: Selecting the right topic helps us prepare the response, route your request faster, and keep the conversation focused from the first message.

general.title: General information
general.description: Questions about the platform, courses, or availability.

support.title: Technical support
support.description: Something is not working as expected? We can help.

creator.title: Creator access
creator.description: Request access to create and manage learning content.

premium.title: Premium access
premium.description: Ask about premium access, tailored plans, or upgrades.

form.title: Write one clear message and send it with context.
form.description: We will prefill your email with the details below so your message already arrives structured and ready to review.
form.note: The button above opens your email app with the request already structured for the BG Defender team.

fields.name: Full name
fields.subject: Subject
fields.messagePlaceholder: Share the details you want our team to review and respond to.

context.generalPlaceholder: Add any useful context so we can point you in the right direction.
context.supportPlaceholder: Tell us where the issue happened and what you were trying to do.
context.creatorLabel: Tell us about the learning space you want to build
context.creatorPlaceholder: Share a few lines about your content, audience, or workflow goals.
context.premiumLabel: Tell us what kind of access you are looking for
context.premiumPlaceholder: Let us know whether you need premium access for yourself, a team, or a program.

contact.title: Prefer a direct message?
contact.description: If you already know what you need, you can email the team directly and we will route it from there.

response.support: Technical support requests are usually reviewed within one business day.
response.access: Access, creator, and premium requests are typically reviewed within two business days.
response.context: Clear context helps the team respond faster and with fewer follow-up questions.

tips.account: Your account email or the workspace you are using.
tips.course: The course, page, or feature involved in your request.
tips.goal: The outcome you are trying to reach so we can guide you properly.
